data.title: 国际服主线Vol.2更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] Sensei, a new main story, Clockwork Flower Pavane will be released on 12/14 (Tue)!
data.body:
[Update Preview]

Sensei, a new main story, Clockwork Flower Pavane will be released on 12/14 (Tue)!
Stay tuned for the new story set at the Millennium Science School!

#BlueArchive
